channel.title: Sattiyan Selvarajah - Technology Lead & Founder
channel.description: Sattiyan Selvarajah is Technology Lead at G6 Labs Asia and founder of Dotkod Solutions, specializing in system architecture, product engineering, and GenAI automation with Laravel, Node.js, and Python.

item.title: GSendr - Enterprise Email Infrastructure. Built for Control & Deliverability.
item.description: The email campaign platform for organizations and teams requiring reliable delivery, integrated validation, and structured communication at scale.

item.title: GBoost.ai - AI Google Ads Autopilot for Local Business
item.description: GBoost.ai is an AI marketing autopilot for local businesses — now launching and automating Google Ads in three clicks on top of its existing Google Business Profile posts, AI review responses, on-brand visuals, scheduling, and local SEO, all from one dashboard.

item.title: lapar.la - Viral Recipe Platform for Malaysia
item.description: A bilingual, mobile-first recipe platform that ingests creator content from Instagram, converts it into structured recipes, and serves it through a fast PWA experience.

item.title: FEMO - Influencer Marketing Platform
item.description: A comprehensive influencer marketing system connecting brands with content creators. Features job posting, bidding, social media integration, payment processing, and real-time messaging.

item.title: 3rd SPACE by Triterra
item.description: A modern community website for The MET Corporate Towers showcasing spaces, events, and community happenings. Built using Wix's drag-and-drop platform to deliver a responsive, content-rich experience.

item.title: InvestED Portal - Backend API & Admin Dashboard
item.description: A robust backend application management system with RESTful API and comprehensive admin dashboard for InvestED's leadership and foundation programmes, featuring automated workflows, role-based access control, and seamless WordPress integration.

item.title: Lily-th
item.description: An adventure game exploring the story of a person with a dual personality. A narrative-driven experience that delves into the complexities of identity and inner conflict.

item.title: Oblivion
item.description: A simple adventure game made with Unreal Engine 4. An exploration-based experience showcasing 3D game development and level design capabilities.

item.title: Ravage
item.description: A labyrinth or maze genre game with First Person View camera mode. A puzzle game that challenges players to navigate through complex mazes and solve puzzles.
